trait.confidence_notes: No genome-wide significant chrX loci in current build. GWAS is sex-combined; dosage-compensation assumptions are not explicit.
trait.category: UK Biobank Assessment Centre > Touchscreen > Health and medical history > Medical conditions
trait.description_more: ACE touchscreen question "Which bones did you fracture/break? (You can select more than one answer)" The following checks were performed:  If code -1 was selected, then no additional choices were allowed.  If code -3 was selected, then no additional choices were allowed.   ~F6151~ was collected from participants who indicated they have had fractured/broken bones in the last 5 years, as defined by their answers to ~F2463~
